Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) products = data['products'] total = len\(products\) print\(f'Vinyl-Produkte: {total}'\) fields = ['daemmung_id', 'sockelleisten_id', 'daemmung_option_ids', 'sockelleisten_option_ids', 'setangebot_einzelpreis', 'setangebot_gesamtpreis', 'setangebot_ersparnis_euro', 'paketpreis_s', 'artikelbeschreibung'] for field in fields: filled = 0 for p in products: val = p.get\(field\) if val is None: continue if isinstance\(val, str\) and val.strip\(\) == '': continue if isinstance\(val, list\) and len\(val\) == 0: continue if isinstance\(val, bool\) and val == False: continue if isinstance\(val, \(int, float\)\) and val == 0: continue filled += 1 print\(f'{field:<40} {filled:>3}/{total} \({filled/total*100:.0f}%\)'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) products = data['products'] total = len\(products\) print\(f'Parkett-Produkte: {total}'\) fields = ['daemmung_id', 'sockelleisten_id', 'daemmung_option_ids', 'sockelleisten_option_ids', 'setangebot_einzelpreis', 'setangebot_gesamtpreis', 'setangebot_ersparnis_euro', 'paketpreis_s'] for field in fields: filled = sum\(1 for p in products if p.get\(field\) not in [None, '', 0, [], False]\) print\(f'{field:<40} {filled:>3}/{total}'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json from collections import Counter data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) cats = Counter\(\) for p in data['products']: for c in p.get\('categories', []\): cats[c['slug']] += 1 for slug, count in cats.most_common\(\): print\(f'{slug:<40} {count}'\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for p in data['products']: cats = [c['slug'] for c in p.get\('categories',[]\)] print\(f\\"{p['slug']}|{','.join\(cats\)}|{p['price']}|{p['stock_status']}|{bool\(p.get\('short_description'\)\)}|{bool\(p.get\('images'\)\)}\\"\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) seen_cats = set\(\) selected = [] for p in data['products']: cats = [c['slug'] for c in p.get\('categories',[]\)] main_cat = cats[0] if cats else 'none' if main_cat not in seen_cats or len\(selected\) < 20: seen_cats.add\(main_cat\) selected.append\(p['slug']\) for s in selected[:20]: print\(s\) ")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json, re data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for p in data: slug = p['slug'] if 'lager' in slug or 'set' in slug or 'warenlager' in slug: content = p.get\('content',{}\).get\('rendered',''\) imgs = re.findall\(r'<img[^>]+src=\\"\([^\\"]+\)\\"', content\) print\(f'{slug:<45} ID={p[\\"id\\"]} imgs={len\(imgs\)}'\) for img in imgs[:3]: print\(f' {img}'\) ")
